About Us

Built by makers,
for makers.

0machine was born in a laser studio. We got tired of spreadsheets, sticky notes, and lost quotes — so we built the tool we always wished existed.

Our Mission

We believe that professional fabricators — laser cutting studios, CNC shops, and making businesses — deserve tools as precise and reliable as the machines they operate.

0machine replaces the patchwork of spreadsheets and mental math with a single, accurate, professional platform. From calculating the true cost of a job to sending a polished quote in minutes, every feature is designed to help you run a tighter, more profitable business.

We are a small, focused team who care deeply about getting the details right. Every calculation in the platform has been validated against real fabrication scenarios. No filler, no demos, no fake data.

⚡
Accuracy. Clarity. Control.
🎯
Accuracy First
Every calculation — material cost, laser time, electricity, profit margin — is validated against real-world data. No approximations, no demos.
🔒
Your Data, Your Business
Your projects, quotes, and client data are private and belong to you. We never sell or share your data with advertisers or third parties.
⚡
Fast & Lightweight
We optimize relentlessly. 0machine loads fast and feels instant on any device, from your studio desktop to your phone on the shop floor.
🤝
Maker Community
We build 0machine in close dialogue with the makers and fabricators using it. Your feedback directly shapes the product roadmap.

Proudly Independent

We're not venture-capital funded. We're not chasing growth at all costs.

0machine is an independent product operated by Cooldelo Ltd. We are self-funded, sustainable, and wholly focused on building the best fabrication management tool for the maker community. That means we answer to our customers — not investors.

Join thousands of fabricators

Start your free 3-day trial today. No credit card required.

Get Started Free →
